meaning: n.[律](财产,权利等)受让人,承让人,被调任者
examples: The transferee must ensure the quality of the product.
Proof of identity of both the licensee and transferee .
The transferee must see to it that the quality of the product is maintained.
The Creditor sued the both the Debtor and Transferee for fraudulent transfer and civil conspiracy.
The Transferee took a loan against the Northridge property and then defaulted on it.
